title: Stage 4: Multi-Route PII Detection Evaluation

opf.training: Fine-tuned OPF on 79-class AU PII schema

qwen_head.type: Span classifier head on frozen Qwen3.5-9B (80 classes including NON_PII)
qwen_head.training: Trained on cached Qwen span embeddings with soft targets

hybrid.type: OPF candidate spans + Qwen re-scoring + policy layer
hybrid.bottleneck: OPF subprocess-per-text call takes ~0.9s, too slow for 9600-test-example evaluation

qwen_head_only_metrics.role: Given-span type distribution model (classifies candidate spans into 80-class softmax)

hybrid_smoke_metrics.note: Full hybrid evaluation NOT run because subprocess-per-example OPF inference is too slow (~0.9s/text). Needs batched OPF inference API.

architecture.step_1: OPF detector extracts candidate PII spans from raw text
architecture.step_2: Qwen span classification head re-scores each span (80-class softmax with temperature 1.035854)
architecture.step_3: Policy layer computes risk_score = sum(prob(label) * risk_weight(label)) using CSV Data Classification weights
architecture.step_5: Redaction wrapper merges overlapping spans and replaces with <REDACTED>

smoke_results.note: 0 redactions because default threshold 0.60 is conservative; highest risk in smoke was ~0.48 (DATE_OF_BIRTH)

known_issues.detail: Redact >= 0.60, Review >= 0.25. No smoke example exceeded 0.60. Consider lowering to 0.40-0.50 for production.
known_issues.impact: All PII spans classified as review or ignore; zero redactions in smoke test.

known_issues.issue: OPF missed BSB/bank account, Medicare, ambiguous dates in smoke
known_issues.detail: BANK_ACCOUNT_NUMBER and MEDICARE_NUMBER exist in OPF label space but model fails to detect them. DATE_OF_BIRTH missed on ambiguous dates without DOB context.
known_issues.impact: False negatives for financial and health identifiers in standalone OPF mode.

known_issues.issue: Hybrid pipeline needs optimized batch OPF inference
known_issues.detail: Current implementation calls OPF CLI via subprocess for each text (~0.9s/text). Full test set (9659 examples) would take ~2.4 hours.
known_issues.fix: Implement batched OPF Python API call or use OPF eval command for large-scale evaluation.

known_issues.issue: GENDER detection near-zero in OPF (F1=0.36 test)
known_issues.detail: GENDER has very low recall in OPF. Qwen head also struggles with GENDER (accuracy below 80%).
known_issues.impact: Gender information largely passes through undetected.

known_issues.issue: LONGITUDE/LATITUDE very low OPF recall (F1=0.31/0.52 test)
known_issues.detail: Coordinate values rarely detected by OPF. Training data may be insufficient.
known_issues.impact: Location data may not be redacted.

recommended_next_steps: 1. Implement batched OPF inference to enable full hybrid evaluation.
2. Run policy threshold sweep on dev data to find optimal redact/review thresholds.
3. Consider lowering redact threshold to 0.40-0.50 for practical use.
4. Augment training data for GENDER, LONGITUDE, MEDICARE_NUMBER, BANK_ACCOUNT_NUMBER.
5. Add confidence thresholding to OPF spans before Qwen re-scoring.
6. Evaluate end-to-end redaction quality with human review.
